executiveSummary.text: GH Research PLC (GHRS) is now back in sync with the canonical DYOR HQ sheet after the metadata repair pass. The current stance is REDUCE with conviction 46/100, using $15.72 as the latest stored price reference where available.

businessModel.text: GH Research PLC operates in life sciences, where the investment case depends on pipeline execution, regulatory outcomes, commercial uptake and balance-sheet runway. The rebuilt note replaces generic or misaligned copy with a correct company-level summary.

recentCatalysts.text: Clinical data, regulatory decisions, partnership milestones and launch execution are the main catalysts. Cash burn versus funded runway remains central where the business is still scaling.

thesisEvaluation.text: Base case: the core operating backdrop remains good enough to support the present reduce stance, but not strong enough to justify a looser risk view without better evidence. Bull case: execution and demand improve faster than expected. Bear case: operating or funding pressure worsens and compresses valuation further.

keyRisks.text: Clinical setbacks can materially impair the thesis. Regulatory delays can defer revenue and financing options. Commercial uptake may lag if competition intensifies. Capital needs can dilute shareholders. Single-product or single-platform concentration raises volatility.

risks.risk: Clinical setbacks can materially impair the thesis.
Regulatory delays can defer revenue and financing options.
Commercial uptake may lag if competition intensifies.
Single-product or single-platform concentration raises volatility.

whoShouldOwn.text: Own: Specialist healthcare investors who accept binary event risk. Avoid: Investors who need near-term earnings visibility and low drawdown risk.

recommendation.text: REDUCE - Conviction: 46/100. This rebuilt page is intentionally concise, but it is now internally coherent and aligned to the corrected ticker and company metadata.

entryExit.text: Keep position sizing consistent with a reduce stance until fuller company-specific analysis is refreshed.
